mapper.select: select userid, null as userpw, username, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(updatedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as updatedate, enabled, dept_cd, dept_name from cotdl.tbl_member where userid != 'admin' order by regdate desc
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_member (userid, userpw, username, regdate, updatedate, enabled, dept_cd, dept_name) values (#{userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userpw, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), #{enabled, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upper(#{dept_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{dept_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into COTDL.tbl_member (userid, userpw, username, regdate, updatedate, enabled, dept_cd, dept_name) values (#{userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userpw, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), #{enabled, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upper(#{dept_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{dept_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_member where userid= #{userid} and UPDATEDATE <= DATE_SUB(now(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_member where userid= #{userid} and userid != 'admin'
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_member set userpw= #{userpw, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, username= #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, regdate= str_to_date(#{regdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s'), updatedate= now(), enabled= #{enabled, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_cd= upper(#{dept_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), dept_name= #{dept_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where userid= #{userid} and userid != 'admin'

update cotdl.tbl_member set username= #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, regdate= str_to_date(#{regdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s'), updatedate= str_to_date(#{updatedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s'), enabled= #{enabled, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_cd= upper(#{dept_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), dept_name= #{dept_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where userid= #{userid} and userid != 'admin'
mapper.select:
select userid, null as userpw, username, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(updatedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as updatedate, enabled , dept_cd, dept_name from cotdl.tbl_member where userid != 'admin'
order by regdate desc limit #{offset}, #{amount}
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_member where userid != 'admin'
